sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Gupkhiatna ngah ding Pasian in thu hong ciamzo,
Ama Topa Jesuh min a um
khempeuhte.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Hallelujah! Khinzo, Tapa min ka um zo;
Ama sisan in kei hong gumkhia
khinzo ta!
Hallelujah! Khinzo; Tapa min ka umzo;
Ama sisan in kei hong gumkhia khinzo
ta.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Tua l amp gam dai-in a lauhuai hangin ah,
Topa Jesuh in kei hong paipih zo ding
hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Ka it ka ngaih tampi vantung gam sung tungzo,
Lungmuang tak tua gamah hih lapi sa
uh hi.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Naupang note Ama kiangah ding uh ka mu,
Gupkhiatna la sa uh Amah na nui
hiuhiau.

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: Kikhopna sung kumpite kamsangte ka mu,
Kham kongzing lampite zui-in lasa uh
hi.

sections.label: Verse 6
lines: Nang le kei adingin tua lai-ah la om hi,
A tawntung tua lai-ah i phat tawntung
ding hi.
